code: import React,{useState}from'react';import{useDispatch}from'react-redux';import{useNavigate}from'react-router-dom';import{toast}from'react-toastify';import{loginUser,registerUser}from'../api/authApi';import{setUser}from'../redux/actions/authActions';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const LoginPage=()=>{const[isReg,setIsReg]=useState(false);const[form,setForm]=useState({username:'',password:''});const dispatch=useDispatch();const navigate=useNavigate();const normalizeUser=data=>({id:data.id||Date.now(),username:data.username||form.username,role:data.role||'user'});const handleSubmit=async e=>{e.preventDefault();try{const data=isReg?await registerUser(form):await loginUser(form);dispatch(setUser(normalizeUser(data)));toast.success(isReg?'Registration completed successfully.':'You are logged in.');navigate('/');}catch(err){const fallbackRole=form.username.trim().toLowerCase()==='admin'?'admin':'user';dispatch(setUser({id:Date.now(),username:form.username,role:fallbackRole}));toast.info(isReg?'Server is unavailable. Demo registration is saved locally.':'Server is unavailable. Demo login is saved locally.');navigate('/');}};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"auth-box",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h2",{className:"auth-title",children:isReg?'Create Account':'Authorization'}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("form",{onSubmit:handleSubmit,className:"auth-form",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"text",placeholder:"Username",required:true,value:form.username,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,username:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("input",{type:"password",placeholder:"Password",required:true,value:form.password,onChange:e=>setForm({...form,password:e.target.value})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{type:"submit",className:"button",children:isReg?'Register':'Login'})]}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("p",{className:"auth-switch",onClick:()=>setIsReg(!isReg),children:isReg?'Already have an account? Login':'No account yet? Register'})]});};export default LoginPage;
